title: Henry A. Bumstead
body: Henry Andrews Bumstead (March 12, 1870 – December 31, 1920) was an American physicist who taught at Yale from 1897 to 1920. In 1918 he was scientific attache to the United States embassy in London. In 1920 he was Chairman of the National Research Council.
categories: American expatriate academics in the United Kingdom
Members of the American Philosophical Society
Presidents of the American Physical Society
